rule: A5 Gamma cross-check: one-sided lower bound; flag (NOT auto-exclude -> getLogs spot-check) if recovered scaledCollateralVolume/Gamma volumeNum < tol_low. Derived from known-complete (un-truncated validation) markets, both classes, set to admit the worst-case definitional gap (extreme-price HFT markets). Reported as-derived, never tuned to corpus F1/F2/F3 outcomes.
